<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tools/gen_spells.py from data/spells.json — do not hand-edit -->


The Magery spellbook holds 64 spells in 8 circles. Each circle has a fixed mana cost and a Magery skill band: below the minimum the cast always fails, at or above the maximum it never fizzles. Casting from a scroll counts as two circles lower for the skill check.

## Circles

| Circle | Mana | Min Magery (0% success) | Magery for 100% |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 (First) | 4 | 0 | 20 |
| 2 (Second) | 6 | 0 | 34.3 |
| 3 (Third) | 9 | 8.6 | 48.6 |
| 4 (Fourth) | 11 | 22.9 | 62.9 |
| 5 (Fifth) | 14 | 37.1 | 77.1 |
| 6 (Sixth) | 20 | 51.4 | 91.4 |
| 7 (Seventh) | 40 | 65.7 | 105.7 |
| 8 (Eighth) | 50 | 80 | 120 |

Skill values come from `MagerySpell.GetCastSkills` (success chance ramps linearly across the 40-point band).
